text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Gemma 3 Technical Report" is confirmed real at arXiv:2503.19786, published March 25, 2025, by the Gemma Team. The cited authors (Aishwarya Kamath, Johan Ferret, Shreya Pathak, etc.) exactly match the real author list; the only discrepancy is that the first author is listed as "Gemma" instead of "Gemma Team," which is an acceptable shorthand for a large 200+ author collaborative paper.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.19786
